# Curated third-party agent skills

These unmodified skills were selected by the installed architecture package and are
pinned to Vercel's `f8a72b9603728bb92a217a879b7e62e43ad76c81` commit, reviewed on
2026-07-15. Project requirements, security policy, and
the selected architecture take precedence over advisory skill guidance.
This inventory is the native copy for the enabled `cursor` controller.

- `vercel-react-best-practices`: [source](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-skills/tree/f8a72b9603728bb92a217a879b7e62e43ad76c81/skills/react-best-practices), MIT
